g.text: crm:P3_has_note "Probably based on an actual historical figure,
The legendary figure was the son of Zeus and Alcmene ..."
dc:description "Probably based on an actual historical figure,
The legendary figure was the son of Zeus and Alcmene ..."
but was taken over at early date by Thebes"
gvp:parentString "Classical Mythology> Greek heroic legends> Story of Hercules"
but was taken over at early date by Thebes"
